item.title: Credential health probes
item.intent: Detect expired or invalid credentials before they cause silent agent failures. Every configured integration must report pass/fail with an actionable fix message.
item.description: SILENT FAILURE PREVENTION: Credential expiry is one of the top reasons agents stop working without explanation. A user who set up their Anthropic key three months ago has no idea it expired. Probes run on schedule and surface the problem before the next tool call silently fails. Built-in probes for Anthropic, OpenAI, Telegram cover the most common integrations. Acceptance: probe reports correct pass/fail for each integration; failed credential surfaces actionable message; 'clawhq creds' outputs clean table.
steps: Build probes for Anthropic, OpenAI, Telegram integrations
Define extensible probe interface for adding new integrations
Implement report aggregation for 'clawhq creds' output
acceptanceCriteria: Probes report correct pass/fail for each configured integration
Failed credentials surface actionable fix message
Probe interface extensible for new integrations
